offer: For property managers processing 5–15 properties/month, inconsistent utility data reporting causes unexpected costs. We automate utility data collection and reporting instead of manual tracking of utility bills and usage.
problem: Inconsistent utility data reporting leads to unexpected costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try Monthly utility usage data collection and dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
